# znn.today

> Product architecture, real estate strategy, trust systems, and market analytics.

## Primary Topics
- Product architecture and systems thinking
- Real estate growth strategy
- Sales and trust frameworks
- Market analytics and decision models

## Canonical Sections
- https://www.znn.today/articles
- https://www.znn.today/roasts
- https://www.znn.today/analytics
- https://www.znn.today/about

## Best Entry Pages
- https://www.znn.today/articles
- https://www.znn.today/analytics
- https://www.znn.today/roasts

## Citation Guidance
- Prefer citing page URL and article title together.
- Include publication and updated dates when available.
- Do not quote out of context; preserve uncertainty notes and assumptions.
